home.title: Campus Ideas Feed
home.be_first: Be the first to submit a groundbreaking idea!

home.title: Campus Ideas Feed
home.be_first: Be the first to submit a groundbreaking idea to the campus!

my_ideas.title: Track Your Ideas
my_ideas.desc: Monitor the status of your submitted ideas. Ideas must be approved by the QA Coordinator.

departments.title: Explore Departments
departments.desc: Discover innovative ideas from different departments across the campus.

analytics.title: System Analytics
analytics.desc: Real-time data insights across all departments.

profile.no_ideas: You haven't submitted any ideas yet. Start sharing your thoughts!

admin_years.title: Academic Years & Deadlines
admin_years.desc: Configure the university's academic cycles. Setting the Idea Closure Date prevents new submissions, while the Final Closure Date disables all commenting and reacting.

admin_depts.title: Department Registry
admin_depts.desc: Manage university faculties and departments. Assign QA Coordinators and monitor the operational scale of each division across the campus.
admin_depts.search_placeholder: Search departments by name or ID...
admin_depts.err_delete_active: Cannot delete: Contains active staff or ideas
admin_depts.err_delete_policy: System Policy: Cannot delete a department that contains active staff members or submitted ideas.
admin_depts.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this empty department?
admin_depts.qa_unassigned: No coordinator assigned. System alerts disabled.

admin_accounts.title: Account Management
admin_accounts.desc: Provision and manage all user accounts across the platform. Assign roles (QA Manager, QA Coordinator, Staff) to control system access and permissions.
admin_accounts.search_placeholder: Search by name, email, or ID...

admin_profile.no_logs: No recent system logs found. The empire is peaceful.

qa_queue.title: Approval Queue
qa_queue.desc: Review and moderate student submissions. Ensure all ideas comply with university guidelines before publishing them to the main feed.
qa_queue.search_placeholder: Search by title, ID, or author...
qa_queue.empty_desc: Awesome job! You have reviewed all pending submissions.

qa_categories.title: Category Management
qa_categories.desc: Create tags to organize staff ideas. Note: Per University policy, categories can only be deleted if they have not been used in any submissions.
qa_categories.err_delete_used: Cannot delete: Category is in use
qa_categories.err_delete_policy: System Policy: Cannot delete a category that is already in use by submitted ideas.
qa_categories.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this unused category?

qa_dashboard.title: System Overview
qa_dashboard.desc: Monitor university-wide idea submissions, approval rates, and department engagement in real-time.
qa_dashboard.engagement_desc: Engagement rate is calculated based on comments and reactions relative to total unique logins this week.

qa_staff.title: Student Directory
qa_staff.desc: Monitor student accounts, view their department affiliations, and track their contribution to the platform.
qa_staff.search_placeholder: Search by student name or email...

qa_profile.no_approvals: No recent approvals found. The queue is waiting for your review.

dept_dashboard.desc: Monitor idea submissions from your department staff. Ensure everyone participates and follows university guidelines.
dept_dashboard.duty_msg: Your department is currently at {rate} participation. You have {missing} staff members who haven't submitted any ideas yet.

qa_coord_profile.no_staff: No staff members found in your department.
